# Welcome

Discuss adaptive GitHub repository coordination for software, documentation, writing, research, data, operations, publishing, and mixed work.

Useful topics include installation, agent access, inventories, portfolio review, cross-repository routing, tool fit, safety, feedback from real runs, and portable Agent Skills behavior.

Before posting, remove private repository names, account details, organization configuration, client information, local paths, and credentials.

## Start in Two Lines

Install the skill with the [quickstart that requires no terminal](../../docs/QUICKSTART.md). Ask it to begin without inspecting anything, state what it can actually see, and recommend the smallest reversible improvement with one plain sentence explaining which risk the boundary reduces.
